query:
-- First confirm: all Excel-serial-date items are duplicates of a proper-date item
-- (same invoiceNumber + same description + same contactName + same lineAmount)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS excel_items_with_proper_twin
FROM billing_items AS excel_item
WHERE excel_item.invoiceDate REGEXP '^[0-9]{5}$'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM billing_items AS proper_item
    WHERE proper_item.invoiceNumber = excel_item.invoiceNumber
      AND proper_item.description = excel_item.description
      AND proper_item.contactName = excel_item.contactName
      AND proper_item.lineAmount = excel_item.lineAmount
      AND proper_item.invoiceDate NOT REGEXP '^[0-9]{5}$'
  );
command:
